name: Picnic Coleslaw
recipeIngredient: 12 Green onions with tops, thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine shredded cabbage, shredded carrots, crumbled bacon, and sliced green onions.
2. In a jar with a tight-fitting lid, whisk together cider vinegar, vegetable oil, sugar, and salt until well combined.
3. Just before serving, pour the dressing over the cabbage mixture and toss gently until everything is evenly coated.
